word: G3364 - οὐ μή - ou mḗ - oo may - Any more

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὐμή

- Transliteration: Ou me

- Phonetic: oo may

- Definition:

1. never, certainly not, not at all, by no means

- Origin: from G3756 and G3361

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: That is G3756 and G3361; a double negative strengthening the denial; not at all: - any more at all by any (no) means neither never no (at all) in no case (wise) nor ever not (at all in any wise). Compare G3378.
